item.title: resolve_backlog_file re-checks expected file in fallback loop — skip it
item.intent: When resolve_backlog_file() fails the fast-path check on the expected file, the fallback loop iterates all BACKLOG_FILES including the one already checked, wasting a jq parse — skip it
steps: In resolve_backlog_file(), add a continue condition in the fallback loop when f equals expected
Verify item resolution still works for all edge cases
acceptanceCriteria: The fallback loop skips the already-checked expected file
